name: Avachin repeatable acceptance baseline
description: Repeatable local-first, never-forget, partial fingerprint, safety, budget, recovery, benchmark and frontend-contract acceptance scenarios.

scenarios.title: Unknown copy and local-first resolution
scenarios.description: Verifies Unknown test-copy creation, local fingerprint precedence and preview fingerprint summaries.

scenarios.title: Recording-centric fingerprint schema
scenarios.description: Verifies recordings, physical audio files, fingerprints, identifiers and migrations remain separate and repeatable.

scenarios.title: Trusted online result becomes local knowledge
scenarios.description: Verifies trusted online identification is learned locally and reused without another online resolution.

scenarios.title: Partial and mid-song fingerprint recognition
scenarios.description: Verifies overlapping fingerprint segments and conservative partial-match behavior.

scenarios.title: Bulk indexing and duplicate audio safety
scenarios.description: Verifies incremental bulk indexing, backups, duplicate protection, reports and file-level isolation.

scenarios.title: AudD request budget guard
scenarios.description: Verifies only real outbound attempts consume the persistent AudD budget and ledger failures are fail-closed.

scenarios.title: Fail-safe temporary audio repair
scenarios.description: Verifies decoder repair uses a validated temporary copy, preserves the original and isolates per-file failures.

scenarios.title: Secret-free runtime status contract
scenarios.description: Verifies versioned status output, read-only database inspection and credential redaction.

scenarios.title: Structured operation events and cancellation
scenarios.description: Verifies process isolation, lifecycle/progress/artifact events, cancellation and accurate zero-count summaries.

scenarios.title: One-command backup and sandbox restore
scenarios.description: Verifies consistent SQLite snapshots, manifest checksums, dry-run behavior, sandbox restore, path safety and external-target authorization.

scenarios.title: Explainable DetectionResult and four-way decision policy
scenarios.description: Verifies separate audio/metadata/identity confidence, normalized evidence, exactly one decision, runtime attachment and JSON/CSV reports.

scenarios.title: Reference corpus, transforms, metrics and zero-false calibration
scenarios.description: Verifies safe corpus bootstrap, hard-negative identity isolation, deterministic transforms, Precision/Recall metrics, query timing and zero-False-Auto-Apply threshold calibration.

scenarios.title: Canonical public entry points
scenarios.description: Verifies scripts, status, operations, recovery, DetectionResult, benchmark and Windows launchers use stable public facades and one version source.
